overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a feudal Japan open-world game, featuring a samurai character in traditional pink kimono and straw hat walking across a wooden bridge and through a village street lined with traditional wooden architecture and autumn foliage.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge crossing with traditional railings

events.description: a man in a grey kimono passes close to the camera and exits the frame
character steps off the wooden bridge onto the dirt village path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across a wooden bridge, passing by a stone lantern and village buildings

notable_agents.action: man in grey kimono standing on the bridge at the start, then moving away
child sitting on a wooden bench by the bridge railing

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the bridge walkway
traditional wooden bridge railings with vertical posts
green-topped stone lantern at the bridge entrance
traditional Japanese wooden buildings with tiled roofs
forested mountains rising in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a close-up of a villager in grey clothing before the camera follows the player character across a wooden bridge. The bridge features traditional railings and stone lanterns, with a child sitting on a bench to the right. Traditional wooden buildings line the left side while mountains and autumn foliage fill the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: village dirt street between traditional wooden houses

events.description: ground surface changes from wooden bridge planks to dirt and stone path

agents.ego_description: walking down a dirt path between traditional village buildings, approaching other villagers in the distance

notable_agents.action: villager or guard standing near a building entrance as the character passes by
two villagers walking toward the camera in the distance

entered.detail: unpaved dirt and stone path through the village
wooden plank walls lining the left side of the path
tall white banner with family crest hanging from a pole

segments.scene_description: The character steps off the bridge onto a dirt village path lined with wooden fences and traditional houses. A villager stands near the entrance on the left, while white banner poles mark the street. The path continues between buildings with mountains visible ahead, and two villagers appear walking in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a close-up encounter on a traditional bridge into a walk through a rustic village street. It begins with a focused view of a villager in grey clothing before pulling back to follow the player character across a wooden bridge adorned with stone lanterns and railings. As the character passes a child resting on a bench, the view opens up to reveal traditional wooden buildings and distant mountains framed by autumn foliage. The scene then shifts as the character steps off the bridge and onto a dirt path, moving past white banner poles and wooden fences that line the village entrance. Finally, the camera advances deeper into the settlement, passing a villager on the left and heading toward other figures walking in the distance under the mountain skyline.
